A

AcsModel<T> - Interface in org.ddolib.modeling.layered
Defines the structure of an optimization model solved using the Anytime Column Search (ACS) algorithm within the Decision Diagram Optimization (DDO) framework.
AcsModel<T> - Interface in org.ddolib.modeling.nolayer
Defines the structure of an optimization model solved using the Anytime Column Search (ACS) algorithm within the Decision Diagram Optimization (DDO) framework using the NoLayer API.
AcsSolver<T> - Class in org.ddolib.solving.acs.core.solver.layered
Implementation of an Anytime Column Search (ACS) solver for decision diagram-based optimization problems.

Given the current node and one of its successor.
checkHashCodeAndEquality(T, Decision, BiFunction<T, Decision, T>) - Static method in class org.ddolib.util.debug.DebugUtil
Checks the consistency of a transition function by generating two states from the same origin state and decision, then verifying that they are equal and have the same hash code.

CompilationConfig<T> - Class in org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.compilation.layered
Represents the configuration parameters used during the compilation of a Multi-valued Decision Diagram (MDD) or similar decision structure.
CompilationConfig(Model<T>) - Constructor for class org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.compilation.layered.CompilationConfig
Constructs a new compilation configuration for the given model.
compilationType - Variable in class org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.compilation.layered.CompilationConfig
Specifies how the MDD is compiled.
CompilationType - Enum Class in org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.compilation
Specifies the type of compilation to use when constructing a decision diagram (DD) for a problem.
compile() - Method in interface org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.mdd.DecisionDiagram
Triggers the compilation of the decision diagram according to the configuration parameters provided by the user (e.g., width, relaxation, variable heuristic, etc.).
compile() - Method in class org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.mdd.layered.LinkedDecisionDiagram
Compiles the decision diagram according to the configuration: Exact, relaxed, or restricted compilation type. Layer-wise variable ordering and heuristics. Application of relaxations or restrictions based on width limits. Construction of the DOT graph if export or debugging is enabled. Optional caching of thresholds for faster branch-and-bound computations.
compile() - Method in class org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.mdd.nolayer.NoLayerDecisionDiagram

DdoModel<T> - Interface in org.ddolib.modeling.nolayer
Defines the interface for an unlayered Dynamic Decision Diagram Optimization (DDO) model.

DdoStopCriterion - Interface in org.ddolib.common.solver.stopcriterion

Defines the different levels of debugging information and validation that can be enabled during the execution of the solver.

Returns the initial state of the problem, containing only the first mark at position 0.

initialState() - Method in class org.ddolib.examples.layered.smic.SMICProblem

LastExactLayer - Enum constant in enum class org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.frontier.CutSetType

Solves the given model using the A* search algorithm with default parameters.

Solves the given model using A* and calls back when new incumbent solutions are found.

Core method for solving a model with the A* search algorithm, with custom limit and callback.

Solves the given model using the Anytime Weighted A* (AWA*) algorithm.
minimizeAwAStar(AwAstarModel<T>, BiConsumer<int[], SearchStatistics>) - Static method in class org.ddolib.modeling.layered.Solvers
Solves the given model using AWA* and calls the callback when a new incumbent is found.
minimizeAwAStar(AwAstarModel<T>, Predicate<SearchStatistics>) - Static method in class org.ddolib.modeling.layered.Solvers
Solves the given model using AWA*, stopping when the limit condition is satisfied.
minimizeAwAStar(AwAstarModel<T>, Predicate<SearchStatistics>, BiConsumer<int[], SearchStatistics>) - Static method in class org.ddolib.modeling.layered.Solvers
Core method for solving a model with the Anytime Weighted A* search algorithm, with custom limit and callback.
minimizeDdo(DdoModel<T>) - Static method in class org.ddolib.modeling.layered.Solvers
Solves the given model using the DDO (Decision Diagram Optimization) algorithm with default stopping criteria and no solution callback.
minimizeDdo(DdoModel<T>, BiConsumer<int[], SearchStatistics>) - Static method in class org.ddolib.modeling.layered.Solvers
Solves the given model using DDO and triggers a callback each time a new incumbent solution is found.
minimizeDdo(DdoModel<T>, Predicate<SearchStatistics>) - Static method in class org.ddolib.modeling.layered.Solvers
Solves the given model using DDO, stopping when the provided limit condition becomes true.
minimizeDdo(DdoModel<T>, Predicate<SearchStatistics>, BiConsumer<int[], SearchStatistics>) - Static method in class org.ddolib.modeling.layered.Solvers

minimizeLns(LnsModel<T>) - Static method in class org.ddolib.modeling.layered.Solvers
Runs a Large Neighborhood Search (LNS) on the specified model without any termination condition and without processing intermediate solutions.
minimizeLns(LnsModel<T>, Predicate<SearchStatistics>) - Static method in class org.ddolib.modeling.layered.Solvers
Runs a Large Neighborhood Search (LNS) on the specified model with a termination condition but without processing intermediate solutions.
minimizeLns(LnsModel<T>, Predicate<SearchStatistics>, BiConsumer<int[], SearchStatistics>) - Static method in class org.ddolib.modeling.layered.Solvers
Runs a Large Neighborhood Search (LNS) on the specified model with a given termination condition and a callback for each solution found.

minRelativeImprovement(double) - Static method in interface org.ddolib.common.solver.stopcriterion.StopCriterion
Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search when the relative improvement between the current incumbent and the previous incumbent is less than or equal to a threshold.
minValidChildrenPercent(double) - Static method in interface org.ddolib.common.solver.stopcriterion.AstarStopCriterion
Creates a stop criterion that terminates the search when the smoothed percentage of valid children falls below or equal to a specified threshold.

O

objective - Variable in class org.ddolib.examples.layered.tsp.TSPGenerator
Best known objective value (optional, -1 if unknown)
objective - Variable in class org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.tsp.TSPGenerator
Best known objective value (optional, -1 if unknown)
OFF - Enum constant in enum class org.ddolib.util.debug.DebugLevel
Disables all debugging features.
ON - Enum constant in enum class org.ddolib.util.debug.DebugLevel
Enables basic debugging checks.

Returns the set of actors already present on location at the current state, i.e., actors involved in past scenes and needed for future scenes.

Returns the value of the openToVisit record component.

org.ddolib - package org.ddolib
Main package of the framework.
org.ddolib.common - package org.ddolib.common
This package contains the interfaces and classes that can be needed for all kind of solvers
org.ddolib.common.dominance - package org.ddolib.common.dominance
This package contains the classes implementing dominance checkers.
org.ddolib.common.solver - package org.ddolib.common.solver
This package contains interfaces that must be extended to implements solvers.
org.ddolib.common.solver.stat - package org.ddolib.common.solver.stat
Provides classes for tracking and representing the statistics and status of a search process in a solver.
org.ddolib.common.solver.stopcriterion - package org.ddolib.common.solver.stopcriterion
Provides interfaces and classes for defining termination criteria (stop criteria) for search processes.
org.ddolib.examples - package org.ddolib.examples
Package containing examples
org.ddolib.examples.layered - package org.ddolib.examples.layered
This package contains models formulated using the layered modeling API.
org.ddolib.examples.layered.alp - package org.ddolib.examples.layered.alp
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Aircraft Landing Problem (ALP).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.boundedknapsack - package org.ddolib.examples.layered.boundedknapsack
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Bounded Knapsack Problem (BKS).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.gruler - package org.ddolib.examples.layered.gruler
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Golomb Rule Problem (GRP).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.knapsack - package org.ddolib.examples.layered.knapsack
This package implements the acs, astar, awastar and ddo models for the Knapsack Problem (KS).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.lcs - package org.ddolib.examples.layered.lcs
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Longest Common Subsequence (LCS) Problem.
org.ddolib.examples.layered.max2sat - package org.ddolib.examples.layered.max2sat
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Maximum 2-Satisfiability Problem (MAX2SAT) Problem.
org.ddolib.examples.layered.maximumcoverage - package org.ddolib.examples.layered.maximumcoverage
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Maximum Coverage problem.
org.ddolib.examples.layered.mcp - package org.ddolib.examples.layered.mcp
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Maximum Cut Problem (MCP).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.misp - package org.ddolib.examples.layered.misp
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Maximum Independent Set Problem (MISP).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.mks - package org.ddolib.examples.layered.mks
The Multidimensional Knapsack Problem (MKP) is a generalization of the KP to multiple capacity constraints: $n$ items and $m$ dimensions of the knapsack are given, each dimension with capacity bound $(C_1,\ldots ,C_m)$.
org.ddolib.examples.layered.msct - package org.ddolib.examples.layered.msct
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Minimum Sum Completion Time (MSCT).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.pdp - package org.ddolib.examples.layered.pdp
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Single Vehicle Pick-up and Delivery Problem (PDP).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.pdptw - package org.ddolib.examples.layered.pdptw
This package contains the implementation of the One vehicle Pickup and Delivery Problem with Time Window (PDPTW) it has two twists: - it only supports one vehicle because DDO-like solvers have this limitation - it can incorporate unrelated nodes that are not within a pickup/delivery pair of node.
org.ddolib.examples.layered.pigmentscheduling - package org.ddolib.examples.layered.pigmentscheduling
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Pigment Sequencing Problem (PSP).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.smic - package org.ddolib.examples.layered.smic
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Single Machine with Inventory Constraint (SMIC).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.srflp - package org.ddolib.examples.layered.srflp
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Single Row Facility Layout Problem (SRFLP).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.talentscheduling - package org.ddolib.examples.layered.talentscheduling
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Talent Scheduling problem (talentSched).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.tsp - package org.ddolib.examples.layered.tsp
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP).
org.ddolib.examples.layered.tsptw - package org.ddolib.examples.layered.tsptw
This package implements the acs, astar and ddo models for the Traveling Salesman Problem with Time Window (TSPTW).
org.ddolib.examples.nolayer - package org.ddolib.examples.nolayer
This package contains models formulated using the unlayered (NoLayer) modeling API.
org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.gruler - package org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.gruler
This package implements the acs and astar models for the Golomb Rule Problem (GRP) using the unlayered API.
org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.knapsack - package org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.knapsack
This package implements the acs and astar models for the Knapsack Problem (KS) using the unlayered API.
org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.misp - package org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.misp
This package implements the acs and astar models for the Maximum Independent Set Problem (MISP) using the unlayered API.
org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.tsp - package org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.tsp
This package implements the acs and astar models for the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) using the unlayered API.
org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.tsptw - package org.ddolib.examples.nolayer.tsptw
This package implements the acs and astar models for the Traveling Salesman Problem with Time Window (TSPTW) using the unlayered API.
org.ddolib.modeling - package org.ddolib.modeling
 
org.ddolib.modeling.layered - package org.ddolib.modeling.layered
This package contains the interfaces and abstract classes that must be implemented as problem specific classes to model a problem.It also contains default implementation.
org.ddolib.modeling.nolayer - package org.ddolib.modeling.nolayer
 
org.ddolib.solving.acs.core - package org.ddolib.solving.acs.core
This package implement Acs search families of search algorithms.
org.ddolib.solving.acs.core.solver - package org.ddolib.solving.acs.core.solver
This package implement Acs solver.
org.ddolib.solving.acs.core.solver.layered - package org.ddolib.solving.acs.core.solver.layered
 
org.ddolib.solving.acs.core.solver.nolayer - package org.ddolib.solving.acs.core.solver.nolayer
 
org.ddolib.solving.astar - package org.ddolib.solving.astar
This package implement A-Star search families of search algorithms.
org.ddolib.solving.astar.core.solver - package org.ddolib.solving.astar.core.solver
This package implement As Star solver.
org.ddolib.solving.astar.core.solver.layered - package org.ddolib.solving.astar.core.solver.layered
 
org.ddolib.solving.astar.core.solver.nolayer - package org.ddolib.solving.astar.core.solver.nolayer
 
org.ddolib.solving.awastar - package org.ddolib.solving.awastar
This package contains the family of Anytime Weighted A* algorithm
org.ddolib.solving.awastar.core.solver - package org.ddolib.solving.awastar.core.solver
This contains the implementation of a Anytime Weighted A* solver for decision diagram-based optimization problems.
org.ddolib.solving.awastar.core.solver.layered - package org.ddolib.solving.awastar.core.solver.layered
 
org.ddolib.solving.ddo - package org.ddolib.solving.ddo
The classes in this package compose the framework you will be using to complete your assignment on the Branch-and-Bound with MDD algorithm.
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core - package org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core
This package contains the core classes and interfaces that are central to the implementation of an optimization solver based on branch and bound with decision diagrams.
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.cache - package org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.cache
This package contains the implementations of cache mechanism.
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.compilation - package org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.compilation
This package contains defining the compilation type and the compilation input
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.compilation.layered - package org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.compilation.layered
 
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.frontier - package org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.frontier
This package contains the classes implementing solver frontiers.
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics - package org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics
This package contains the classes and interfaces defining the heuristics which can be used to customize the behavior of an MDD with some default implementations.
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.cluster - package org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.cluster
This package contains the classes and interfaces defining the heuristics which can be used to discard or merge node during the restriction or relaxation of the MDD.
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.cluster.layered - package org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.cluster.layered
 
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.cluster.nolayer - package org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.cluster.nolayer
 
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.variable - package org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.variable
This package contains heuristics on variable ordering.
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.variable.layered - package org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.variable.layered
 
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.width - package org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.width
This package contains heuristics on the maximum width of a MDD
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.mdd - package org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.mdd
This package contains the classes that are used to implement a restricted/relaxed MDD.
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.mdd.layered - package org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.mdd.layered
 
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.mdd.nolayer - package org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.mdd.nolayer
 
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.profiling - package org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.profiling
This package contains classes useful for the profiling
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.solver - package org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.solver
This package contains solvers using DDO algorithm.
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.solver.layered - package org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.solver.layered
 
org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.solver.nolayer - package org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.solver.nolayer
 
org.ddolib.solving.lns.core.solver - package org.ddolib.solving.lns.core.solver
This package implement LNS solver.
org.ddolib.solving.lns.core.solver.layered - package org.ddolib.solving.lns.core.solver.layered
 
org.ddolib.util - package org.ddolib.util
This package contains the classes implementing utils user in the solver
org.ddolib.util.debug - package org.ddolib.util.debug
This package contains util stuff related to the debug mode.
org.ddolib.util.io - package org.ddolib.util.io
Input file reader utility
org.ddolib.util.verbosity - package org.ddolib.util.verbosity
This package contains util stuff related the verbose mode.

PDPFastLowerBound - Class in org.ddolib.examples.layered.pdp
Provides a fast lower bound estimation for the Pickup and Delivery Problem (PDP).
PDPFastLowerBound(PDPProblem) - Constructor for class org.ddolib.examples.layered.pdp.PDPFastLowerBound
Constructs a new fast lower bound estimator for a given PDP problem instance.
PDPGenerator - Class in org.ddolib.examples.layered.pdp
Utility class for generating instances of the Pickup and Delivery Problem (PDP) with a single vehicle.

PDPLnsMain - Class in org.ddolib.examples.layered.pdp
Entry point for solving the Single Vehicle Pick-up and Delivery Problem (PDP) using a Large Neighborhood Search (LNS) approach combined with Decision Diagram Optimization (DDO).

Represents a Pickup and Delivery Problem (PDP) instance with a single vehicle.

Constructs a PDPProblem from a distance matrix, a map of pickup-delivery pairs, and a maximum vehicle capacity.

Problem<T> - Interface in org.ddolib.modeling.layered
Represents an optimization problem formulated as a labeled transition system, following the semantics of dynamic programming.
Problem<T> - Interface in org.ddolib.modeling.nolayer
Represents an optimization problem formulated as a labeled transition system, without requiring an a priori fixed number of variables.

SMICFastLowerBound - Class in org.ddolib.examples.layered.smic
The SMICFastLowerBound class provides a fast and simple estimation of the lower bound of the remaining cost (or completion time) in the Single Machine with Inventory Constraint (SMIC) scheduling problem.

solution() - Method in class org.ddolib.common.solver.Solution
Returns an array t such that t[i] is the assigned value to the decision variable x_i.
Solution - Class in org.ddolib.common.solver
Wrapper defining a solution from a set of decisions

Utility class providing helper methods to display solutions found by a solver.

Solver - Interface in org.ddolib.common.solver
Interface representing a generic solver for decision diagram based optimization problems.
Solvers - Class in org.ddolib.modeling.layered
The Solvers class acts as a unified entry point for running different optimization algorithms within the Decision Diagram Optimization (DDO) framework.

SRFLPFastLowerBound - Class in org.ddolib.examples.layered.srflp
Provides a fast lower-bound estimation for the Single-Row Facility Layout Problem (SRFLP) based on the current state of the solution.
SRFLPFastLowerBound(SRFLPProblem) - Constructor for class org.ddolib.examples.layered.srflp.SRFLPFastLowerBound
Constructs a fast lower-bound estimator for the given SRFLP problem.
SRFLPLnsMain - Class in org.ddolib.examples.layered.srflp
Entry point for solving the Single Row Facility Layout Problem (SRFLP) using a Large Neighborhood Search (LNS) approach.
SRFLPLnsMain() - Constructor for class org.ddolib.examples.layered.srflp.SRFLPLnsMain
 
SRFLPProblem - Class in org.ddolib.examples.layered.srflp
A Single-Row Facility Layout Problem (SRFLP) instance.

Constructs a new SRFLP instance with given lengths, flows, and optional known optimal.
SRFLPProblem(String) - Constructor for class org.ddolib.examples.layered.srflp.SRFLPProblem
Reads an SRFLP instance from a file.

Implements a ranking between two SRFLPState instances for use in decision diagram or search-based algorithms.

Constructs a new relaxation instance for a given SRFLP problem.

Returns a measure of distance between two states.
StateDistance<T> - Interface in org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.heuristics.cluster.layered
Interface defining a distance function between states, used to form clusters when deciding which nodes on a layer of a decision diagram should be merged.
stateRanking - Variable in class org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.compilation.layered.CompilationConfig
Ranking heuristic used to prioritize states when pruning nodes in width-limited MDD layers.
StateRanking<T> - Interface in org.ddolib.modeling.layered
A state ranking is used to order the states and decides the ones that are kept and the ones that are merged/deleted when a relaxation/restriction occurs.
statistics() - Method in class org.ddolib.common.solver.Solution
Returns the statistics associated to this solution.
statistics() - Method in class org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.SubProblem
Returns a string summarizing key statistics about this subproblem, including its objective value, lower bound, and depth in the decision diagram.
stats() - Method in class org.ddolib.solving.ddo.core.cache.SimpleCache
Returns statistics about the cache, including number of hits, tests, and total entries.
status() - Method in class org.ddolib.common.solver.stat.SearchStatistics
